model.my_project.fct_revenue_daily.name: fct_revenue_daily
model.my_project.fct_revenue_daily.description: Daily revenue fact table by region and product.
model.my_project.fct_revenue_daily.raw_code:
SELECT
  DATE({{ var('run_date', 'CURRENT_DATE') }}) AS revenue_date,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue
FROM {{ ref('stg_orders') }} o
JOIN {{ ref('stg_payments') }} p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
GROUP BY 1
model.my_project.fct_revenue_daily.compiled_code:
SELECT
  DATE(CURRENT_DATE) AS revenue_date,
  SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue
FROM analytics.stg_orders o
JOIN analytics.stg_payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
GROUP BY 1

model.my_project.fct_orders.name: fct_orders
model.my_project.fct_orders.raw_code:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  o.customer_id,
  p.amount,
  {{ var('currency', 'USD') }} AS currency
FROM {{ ref('stg_orders') }} o
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('stg_payments') }} p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
model.my_project.fct_orders.compiled_code:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  o.customer_id,
  p.amount,
  'USD' AS currency
FROM analytics.stg_orders o
LEFT JOIN analytics.stg_payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id

model.my_project.mart_finance_summary.name: mart_finance_summary
model.my_project.mart_finance_summary.description: Finance summary mart aggregating orders and revenue.
model.my_project.mart_finance_summary.raw_code:
SELECT
  r.revenue_date,
  r.total_revenue,
  COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
FROM {{ ref('fct_revenue_daily') }} r
JOIN {{ ref('fct_orders') }} o ON r.revenue_date = DATE(o.created_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
model.my_project.mart_finance_summary.compiled_code:
SELECT
  r.revenue_date,
  r.total_revenue,
  COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
FROM analytics.fct_revenue_daily r
JOIN analytics.fct_orders o ON r.revenue_date = DATE(o.created_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2

model.my_project.stg_campaign_events.name: stg_campaign_events
model.my_project.stg_campaign_events.description: Staging model for raw campaign event data.
model.my_project.stg_campaign_events.raw_code:
SELECT
  event_id,
  campaign_id,
  user_id,
  event_type,
  {{ var('event_ts_col', 'event_timestamp') }} AS event_ts
FROM raw.campaign_events
model.my_project.stg_campaign_events.compiled_code:
SELECT
  event_id,
  campaign_id,
  user_id,
  event_type,
  event_timestamp AS event_ts
FROM raw.campaign_events

model.my_project.fct_campaign_attributio.name: fct_campaign_attribution
model.my_project.fct_campaign_attributio.raw_code:
SELECT
  {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(['campaign_id', 'user_id', 'event_ts']) }} AS attribution_id,
  campaign_id,
  user_id
FROM {{ ref('stg_campaign_events') }}
model.my_project.fct_campaign_attributio.compiled_code:
SELECT
  MD5(campaign_id || user_id || event_ts) AS attribution_id,
  campaign_id,
  user_id
FROM analytics.stg_campaign_events

model.my_project.stg_orders.name: stg_orders
model.my_project.stg_orders.description: Staging model for raw orders data.
model.my_project.stg_orders.raw_code:
SELECT
  order_id,
  customer_id,
  status,
  created_at
FROM {{ source('raw', 'orders') }}
WHERE created_at >= {{ var('min_date', '2020-01-01') }}
model.my_project.stg_orders.compiled_code:
SELECT
  order_id,
  customer_id,
  status,
  created_at
FROM raw.orders
WHERE created_at >= '2020-01-01'

model.my_project.stg_payments.name: stg_payments
model.my_project.stg_payments.description: Staging model for raw payments data.
model.my_project.stg_payments.raw_code:
SELECT
  payment_id,
  order_id,
  amount,
  payment_method,
  paid_at
FROM {{ source('raw', 'payments') }}
model.my_project.stg_payments.compiled_code:
SELECT
  payment_id,
  order_id,
  amount,
  payment_method,
  paid_at
FROM raw.payments

model.my_project.mart_platform_usage.name: mart_platform_usage
model.my_project.mart_platform_usage.description: Platform usage mart with daily rollup.
model.my_project.mart_platform_usage.raw_code:
SELECT
  DATE(event_ts) AS usage_date,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS dau
FROM {{ ref('fct_platform_events') }}
WHERE DATE(event_ts) >= {{ var('lookback_date', 'DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE)') }}
GROUP BY 1
model.my_project.mart_platform_usage.compiled_code:
SELECT
  DATE(event_ts) AS usage_date,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS dau
FROM analytics.fct_platform_events
WHERE DATE(event_ts) >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 1

model.my_project.fct_platform_events.name: fct_platform_events
model.my_project.fct_platform_events.raw_code:
SELECT
  event_id,
  user_id,
  event_type,
  event_ts
FROM raw.platform_events
WHERE user_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM {{ ref('stg_orders') }})
model.my_project.fct_platform_events.compiled_code:
SELECT
  event_id,
  user_id,
  event_type,
  event_ts
FROM raw.platform_events
WHERE user_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM analytics.stg_orders)

model.my_project.fct_risk_exposure.name: fct_risk_exposure
model.my_project.fct_risk_exposure.description: Risk exposure fact table by date and entity.
model.my_project.fct_risk_exposure.raw_code:
SELECT
  DATE(o.created_at) AS risk_date,
  o.customer_id AS entity_id,
  SUM(o.amount) AS exposure_amount,
  {{ var('risk_threshold', '10000') }} AS threshold
FROM {{ ref('fct_orders') }} o
GROUP BY 1, 2
model.my_project.fct_risk_exposure.compiled_code:
SELECT
  DATE(o.created_at) AS risk_date,
  o.customer_id AS entity_id,
  SUM(o.amount) AS exposure_amount,
  10000 AS threshold
FROM analytics.fct_orders o
GROUP BY 1, 2
